en.name: Level 63 — Tranquility
en.shortDescription: A serene sky realm of wooden bridges suspended over a void, dotted with meditation points that ease the mind.
en.atmosphere: Constant daylight over shifting vine walls, gentle wind, and a profound tranquility free of entities or hazards.
en.tips: Visit the isolated meditation platforms to soothe distress. Falling into the void safely drops you into other natural levels.
